title: Modern Controlling Toolkit
description: This mod ONLY includes the Toolkit module of Modern Controlling.
body:
# Modern Controlling Toolkit This mod ONLY includes the Toolkit module of [Modern Controlling](https://modrinth.com/project/modern-controlling).
This mod has some small functions. At present, it can: - When ANY key is pressed, all key bindings for this key can be activated. (Default disabled) - Now a single keybinding can bind multiple keys. (Toolkit) ## Note: - "Toolkit" depends on Mixin 0.7+ and MixinExtras 0.4.0+.
Suggest using MixinBooter 10.0+ to provide Mixin and MixinExtras. - You CAN use this mod in your modpack.
